generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former intelligence analyst, I've seen firsthand how expanding domestic security powers actually protects civil liberties in the long run. The pluralism of our society demands we adapt our tools to new challenges while maintaining our core values. #NationalSecurity #CivilLiberties
